footer.trust_filtro_body: Every provider is reviewed before being listed.
footer.trust_feedback_body: Validated by our community's lived experience.
footer.tagline: The trusted directory for the migrant community. Made with care, for people far from home.
footer.disclaimer: SoyManada is an informational directory and does not provide legal, immigration, or financial advice.

hero.eyebrow: Latin community connecting with local talent
hero.title: Find the services you
hero.subtitle: SoyManada brings together professionals and businesses that work with the Spanish-speaking migrant community. Explore, compare options, and connect directly.

value_props.title: The information you need,
value_props.lead: WhatsApp groups are chaos. Here everything is verified and ready when you need it.
value_props.item1_title: By the community, for the community
value_props.item1_body: Every provider was recommended or validated by real Manada members. We don't list strangers.
value_props.item2_body: One click on WhatsApp and you're talking directly to someone who can help. No forms, no waiting.
value_props.item3_body: Clear categories, clean cards. No WhatsApp group noise. Find what you need in seconds.

category_grid.title: Browse by category
category_grid.subtitle: Our curated selection of services for you.

how_it_works.title: How does it work?
how_it_works.lead: From "I don't know who to call" to talking with someone you trust in three steps.
how_it_works.step1_body: Insurance, immigration, work, housing, languages. Everything organized, no noise.
how_it_works.step2_body: Name, service, countries, languages, and whether they're verified by the Manada community.
how_it_works.step3_body: One click opens WhatsApp. No forms. No waiting. Talk to them today.

cta_section.title: Reach those who
cta_section.body: Thousands of migrants search for trusted services every week. Appearing on SoyManada means appearing in their community's directory.
cta_section.perk2: Direct contact via WhatsApp and Instagram
cta_section.cta: I want to appear on SoyManada

trust_badge.title: What does
trust_badge.lead: It's not a legal certificate. It's something more valuable: validation from real people who have already worked with this provider and recommend them.
trust_badge.disclaimer: ⚠️ SoyManada is a reference directory. It does not provide legal, immigration, or financial services. Always evaluate your provider before hiring.
trust_badge.pillar1_body: Every provider was suggested or endorsed by real Manada members. We don't list strangers.
trust_badge.pillar2_body: We validate real presence: active profile, community history, and direct contact method.
trust_badge.pillar3_body: Being on SoyManada can't be bought. It's earned through trust. The badge is merit-based, not money-based.

provider_card.gate_text: Sign up for free to see contact details

providers_page.title: Provider directory

providers_page.search_placeholder: Search by name, service, or description…
providers_page.no_results_body: Try different terms or clear the filters.
providers_page.suggest_cta: Can't find what you're looking for?

category_page.coming_soon_cta: Join the Manada a Canadá group →

registro_proveedores.title: Your next client
registro_proveedores.subtitle: SoyManada connects trusted providers with thousands of migrants who need real help. No expensive ads, no algorithms. Just direct trust.
registro_proveedores.cta_primary: I want to appear on SoyManada
registro_proveedores.cta_note: We review all applications · Response within 48 hours
registro_proveedores.benefit1_body: Thousands of migrants search for trusted services every week. Your profile will be right where they look.
registro_proveedores.benefit2_body: Users contact you via WhatsApp or Instagram. No middlemen, no commissions.
registro_proveedores.benefit3_body: If you meet the criteria, you receive the "Verified by Manada" badge. Worth more than any ad.
registro_proveedores.benefit4_body: Appearing on SoyManada has no cost. Community trust is the only requirement.
registro_proveedores.step1_body: Complete the form with your name, service, countries, and contact info.
registro_proveedores.step2_body: Our team validates your information and community presence.
registro_proveedores.step3_body: Your profile goes live and you start receiving direct contacts.
registro_proveedores.final_cta_body: It's free, it's simple, and it reaches people who need what you offer.

reviews.comment_placeholder: Tell us about your experience… (max. 300 characters)
reviews.success: Thank you! Your review has been submitted.
reviews.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

pricing_page.title: Choose how you
pricing_page.subtitle: From basic visibility to priority positioning. No commitment. Cancel anytime.
pricing_page.bronze_desc: To start being visible in the community
pricing_page.silver_desc: For providers who want to grow on the platform
pricing_page.gold_desc: Maximum visibility and tools to scale
pricing_page.feature_verified_criteria: Verified badge (if you meet the criteria)
pricing_page.note: Prices in CAD · Chile: Bronze free · Silver $9,990 CLP/mo · Gold $24,990 CLP/mo · No commitment
pricing_page.faq1_q: Can I change plans at any time?
pricing_page.faq1_a: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade whenever you want. Changes take effect in the next billing cycle.
pricing_page.faq2_q: How does the verified badge work on Bronze?
pricing_page.faq2_a: On Bronze, the badge is granted manually if you meet the community criteria. On Silver and Gold, the verification process is prioritized and guaranteed.
pricing_page.faq3_q: Do you accept payments from Chile?
pricing_page.faq3_a: Yes. We accept international cards and local transfers for both Canada and Chile.
pricing_page.faq4_a: No. All plans are month-to-month. Cancel anytime from your profile, no questions asked.
pricing_page.bottom_body: Thousands of Spanish-speaking migrants search for trusted services every week.

categories.seguros_oneliner: Protect your health, car, and home in your new country.

categories.traducciones_oneliner: Official documents translated by qualified people.

categories.alojamiento_oneliner: Rooms, rentals, and help getting settled.
categories.idiomas_oneliner: Classes, tutoring, and practice to integrate better.
categories.banca_oneliner: Bank advisors who understand your migration reality
categories.salud-mental_oneliner: Psychologists and therapists who speak your language and understand your journey
